library_preparation_preflight.summary: The resolved artifact declares org.apache.pekko:pekko-stream_2.13:1.1.5 as a Maven provided dependency, but public Pekko HTTP Core Java APIs reference Pekko Stream and ActorSystem/Materializer types; a minimal Java test using HttpEntities fails to compile without pekko-stream on the test classpath.

deterministic_setup.reason: pekko-http-core_2.13 exposes stream-backed entity, server/client, websocket, and connection APIs, while pekko-stream is marked provided in the POM and is not pulled transitively for generated tests.

library_preparation_preflight.agent_guidance: No Docker image or environment/system property is indicated. For tests that exercise stream-backed entities or low-level HTTP client/server APIs, create a local Pekko ActorSystem/Materializer in test code and terminate it after the test; avoid relying on external network services.
risks: Without the extra pekko-stream test dependency, meaningful coverage that touches HttpEntity, Multipart, Http, or connection APIs can fail at javac due to missing org.apache.pekko.stream and org.apache.pekko.actor types.
Tests that start ActorSystems or bind local HTTP endpoints must clean them up to avoid hanging JVM/native test runs.
